title: Bug - Connect Boards column doesn't update
excerpt: I use a Make.com integration to create a link between two boards. I click a button on the item and magic happens. The link is created and works perfectly, however the Connect boards column doesn’t show the link until I r…

posts.author: TPCouriers (Carla)
posts.cookedHtml: I use a Make.com integration to create a link between two boards. I click a button on the item and magic happens. The link is created and works perfectly, however the Connect boards column doesn’t show the link until I reload the board.
